arts.ttl: REF WATCH: Officials for Carlisle United's clash with Fleetwood
arts.sum: Carlisle United's clash with Fleetwood Town will be refereed by a man who the Blues encountered in dramatic circumstances earlier this season.

arts.ttl: Fleetwood boss Wild has his say on Carlisle United
arts.sum: Pete Wild has insisted Carlisle United’s position at the foot of League Two is “irrelevant” to this weekend’s clash with his Fleetwood side.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United boss on Wild's Fleetwood and Neal involvement
arts.sum: Mike Williamson admits Carlisle United can be under no illusions about what to expect from Pete Wild’s Fleetwood Town this weekend.

arts.ttl: Williamson: How new signing can be 'cheat code' for Carlisle United
arts.sum: Mike Williamson believes new signing Josh Williams’ pace can be a “cheat code” for Carlisle United.

arts.ttl: Former Carlisle United man gets League One caretaker role
arts.sum: A former Carlisle United midfielder is part of the caretaker management team at Bolton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United's crisis-hit rivals hit by transfer embargo
arts.sum: Carlisle United's crisis-hit League Two rivals Morecambe say they have been placed under a transfer embargo.

arts.ttl: After Williams arrival, could Carlisle United now strengthen on the left?
arts.sum: Mike Williamson feels he has enough strength in depth on the left – but isn’t completely ruling out another signing in that department.
